TITLE: Core
PREFIX_DESC: The prefix for the bot commands
SUPPORT_DESC: Discord invite link for the support server

GENERAL.TITLE: Basic Configuration
GENERAL.LOCALE_HELP: The default language for bot responses and dashboard content
GENERAL.THEME_HELP: More themes will be added in future updates
GENERAL.SLASH_HELP: Allows the use of Discord Slash Commands (/help instead of !help)
GENERAL.VERBOSE_HELP: Logs all bot actions in detail (recommended for administrators)
GENERAL.DEBUG_HELP: Shows advanced error information and technical details (may affect performance)

HELP.TITLE: Help & Tips
HELP.PREFIX_TEXT: Choose a unique prefix that doesn't conflict with other bots. Popular prefixes: !, ?, .
HELP.SLASH_TEXT: Slash commands are the modern alternative to text commands. They offer auto-completion and are more user-friendly.
HELP.DEBUG_TEXT: Debug mode should only be enabled when analyzing technical issues.

SETTINGS_OVERVIEW.GENERAL_DESCRIPTION: Configure bot prefix, default language, theme and enable/disable slash commands.
SETTINGS_OVERVIEW.USER_DESCRIPTION: Manage permissions, admin roles and command access.
SETTINGS_OVERVIEW.INTEGRATIONS_DESCRIPTION: Configure external services, webhooks and API access.
SETTINGS_OVERVIEW.PLUGIN_SETTINGS_DESC: Enabled plugins can provide their own settings pages. These appear automatically in the navigation.
SETTINGS_OVERVIEW.PLUGIN_SETTINGS_TIP_TEXT: Check the left navigation - plugin-specific settings can be found under the respective plugin name in the submenus.

USERS.TITLE: User Management
USERS.NOTICE_TEXT: This page is still under development. User permissions, roles and permissions will be managed here in the future.
USERS.ROLES_DESC: Manage Discord roles and their permissions for bot commands.
USERS.BANNED_DESC: Manage users who have been banned from the bot.

INTEGRATIONS.TITLE: Integrations
INTEGRATIONS.NOTICE_TEXT: Connect DuneBot with external services and APIs.
INTEGRATIONS.WEBHOOK_DESC: Configure webhooks to receive external events on your server.
INTEGRATIONS.TWITCH_DESC: Get notified when your streamers go live.
INTEGRATIONS.YOUTUBE_DESC: Notifications for new videos from your favourite YouTubers.
INTEGRATIONS.CUSTOM_API_DESC: Connect the bot to your own API or external services.
INTEGRATIONS.DEV_WARNING_TEXT: These features will be available in future updates.

ACTIVE_PLUGINS.NO_PLUGINS: No plugins activated or available for this server.
